highlights.headline: Raptors win thriller in Game 4 over Cavs to even the series
highlights.description: The Raptors come up clutch down the stretch to take down the Cavaliers in Game 4 and even up the series.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Raptors win thriller in Game 4 over Cavs to even the series) 2026/04/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes hit the go-ahead free throws in the final minute and finished with 23 points, Brandon Ingram also scored 23 and the Toronto Raptors beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 93-89 on Sunday, tying the Eastern Conference first-round playoff series...
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes, Ingram score 23 points apiece as Raptors beat Cavaliers 93-89 and tie series at 2-all

video.headline: Raptors win thriller in Game 4 over Cavs to even the series

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Raptors win thriller in Game 4 over Cavs to even the series) 2026/04/26 ESHEET

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Portland Trail Blazers

highlights.headline: Wemby’s alley-oop slam gives Spurs’ lead
highlights.description: Victor Wembanyama's alley-oop slam dunk gives the Spurs a fourth quarter lead.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby’s alley-oop slam gives Spurs’ lead) 2026/04/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 27 points, 11 rebounds and seven blocks in his return from a concussion and the San Antonio Spurs took a 3-1 lead in their first-round series against the Portland Trail Blazers with a 114-93 victory on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama returns from concussion and Spurs beat Blazers 114-93 to take 3-1 series lead

video.headline: Wemby’s alley-oop slam gives Spurs’ lead

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby’s alley-oop slam gives Spurs’ lead) 2026/04/26 ESHEET
